rows.description: Jan: 29. 1757. Magro Upton Decrem: Test: Nat: 1754
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent and visually verified, including the half-penny. Description taken from Gemini-flash, which had slightly more accurate punctuation and 'Magro' over GPT-5-mini.
